title: Shop Hourly Rate Calculator
description: Calculates the true hourly cost of operating a manufacturing shop, incorporating direct labor, overhead, machine costs, and efficiency losses per industrial engineering standards (ISO 9000, Lean, Six Sigma, WERC).

inputs.label: Direct Labor Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage paid to direct production workers, including base pay and shift differentials.

label_i18n.es: Tarifa horaria de mano de obra directa

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly wage paid to direct production workers, including base pay and shift differentials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan üretim işçilerine ödenen ortalama saatlik ücret, temel ücret ve vardiya farkları dahil.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Stundenlohn für direkt in der Produktion tätige Arbeiter, einschließlich Grundgehalt und Schichtzulagen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire moyen versé aux ouvriers de production directs, incluant le salaire de base et les primes de poste.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario medio por hora pagado a los trabajadores de producción directa, incluyendo salario base y diferenciales de turno.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الأجر بالساعة المدفوع لعمال الإنتاج المباشر، بما في ذلك الأجر الأساسي وفروق الورديات.

inputs.label: Number of Direct Labor Employees
inputs.businessContext: Total headcount of workers directly involved in production.

label_i18n.es: Número de empleados de mano de obra directa

businessContext_i18n.en: Total headcount of workers directly involved in production.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan üretimde çalışan toplam personel sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der direkt in der Produktion tätigen Mitarbeiter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Effectif total des travailleurs directement impliqués dans la production.
businessContext_i18n.es: Plantilla total de trabajadores directamente involucrados en la producción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد العاملين المشاركين مباشرة في الإنتاج.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Hours per Employee
inputs.businessContext: Standard annual hours per employee (e.g., 52 weeks * 40 hours). Adjust for overtime or part-time.

label_i18n.fr: Heures de fonctionnement annuelles par employé

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard annual hours per employee (e.g., 52 weeks * 40 hours). Adjust for overtime or part-time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışan başına standart yıllık saat (ör. 52 hafta * 40 saat). Fazla mesai veya yarı zamanlı için ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Jahresstunden pro Mitarbeiter (z. B. 52 Wochen * 40 Stunden). Anpassung für Überstunden oder Teilzeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures annuelles standard par employé (ex. : 52 semaines * 40 heures). Ajuster pour les heures supplémentaires ou le temps partiel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas anuales estándar por empleado (ej., 52 semanas * 40 horas). Ajustar por horas extra o tiempo parcial.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الساعات السنوية القياسية لكل موظف (مثل 52 أسبوعًا * 40 ساعة). اضبط للعمل الإضافي أو الدوام الجزئي.

inputs.label: Total Annual Overhead Costs
inputs.businessContext: All indirect costs: rent, utilities, management salaries, insurance, taxes, maintenance, IT, etc.

label_i18n.fr: Coûts totaux annuels des frais généraux

businessContext_i18n.en: All indirect costs: rent, utilities, management salaries, insurance, taxes, maintenance, IT, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm dolaylı maliyetler: kira, kamu hizmetleri, yönetim maaşları, sigorta, vergiler, bakım, BT vb.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alle indirekten Kosten: Miete, Nebenkosten, Managementgehälter, Versicherungen, Steuern, Wartung, IT usw.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tous les coûts indirects : loyer, services publics, salaires de la direction, assurances, taxes, entretien, informatique, etc.
businessContext_i18n.es: Todos los costes indirectos: alquiler, servicios públicos, salarios de gestión, seguros, impuestos, mantenimiento, TI, etc.
businessContext_i18n.ar: جميع التكاليف غير المباشرة: الإيجار، المرافق، رواتب الإدارة، التأمين، الضرائب، الصيانة، تكنولوجيا المعلومات، إلخ.

inputs.label: Total Annual Machine Costs
inputs.businessContext: Depreciation, lease payments, repairs, tooling, and energy costs for all production equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Depreciation, lease payments, repairs, tooling, and energy costs for all production equipment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm üretim ekipmanları için amortisman, kira ödemeleri, onarımlar, takım ve enerji maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abschreibungen, Leasingraten, Reparaturen, Werkzeuge und Energiekosten für alle Produktionsanlagen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Amortissement, paiements de location, réparations, outillage et coûts énergétiques pour tous les équipements de production.
businessContext_i18n.es: Depreciación, pagos de arrendamiento, reparaciones, herramientas y costes energéticos de todos los equipos de producción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الإهلاك، مدفوعات الإيجار، الإصلاحات، الأدوات، وتكاليف الطاقة لجميع معدات الإنتاج.

inputs.label: Average Shop Efficiency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or labor efficiency, accounting for downtime, setup, and speed loss.

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or labor efficiency, accounting for downtime, setup, and speed loss.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genel ekipman etkinliği (OEE) veya işçilik verimliliği; duruş, kurulum ve hız kaybını hesaba katar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtanlageneffektivität (OEE) oder Arbeitseffizienz unter Berücksichtigung von Ausfallzeiten, Rüstzeiten und Geschwindigkeitsverlusten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité globale des équipements (OEE) ou efficacité de la main-d'œuvre, tenant compte des temps d'arrêt, de réglage et de perte de vitesse.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia general del equipo (OEE) o eficiencia laboral, considerando tiempo de inactividad, configuración y pérdida de velocidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الفعالية الكلية للمعدات (OEE) أو كفاءة العمالة، مع مراعاة وقت التوقف، الإعداد، وفقدان السرعة.

inputs.label: Quality Yield (%)
inputs.businessContext: First-pass yield or overall yield; rework and scrap increase effective hourly cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: First-pass yield or overall yield; rework and scrap increase effective hourly cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk geçiş verimi veya genel verim; yeniden işleme ve fire efektif saatlik maliyeti artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erstausbeute oder Gesamtausbeute; Nacharbeit und Ausschuss erhöhen die effektiven Stundenkosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement au premier passage ou rendement global ; les reprises et rebuts augmentent le coût horaire effectif.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento de primera pasada o rendimiento general; el retrabajo y el desperdicio aumentan el costo horario efectivo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المردود من المحاولة الأولى أو المردود الإجمالي؛ إعادة العمل والهدر يزيدان التكلفة الفعلية للساعة.

inputs.label: Shift Premium Factor
inputs.businessContext: 1.0 for single shift, 1.1 for two-shift, 1.2 for three-shift operations (accounts for shift differentials).

businessContext_i18n.en: 1.0 for single shift, 1.1 for two-shift, 1.2 for three-shift operations (accounts for shift differentials).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek vardiya için 1.0, iki vardiya için 1.1, üç vardiya için 1.2 (vardiya farklarını hesaba katar).
businessContext_i18n.de: 1,0 für Einschichtbetrieb, 1,1 für Zweischichtbetrieb, 1,2 für Dreischichtbetrieb (berücksichtigt Schichtzulagen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1,0 pour un seul poste, 1,1 pour deux postes, 1,2 pour trois postes (tient compte des primes de poste).
businessContext_i18n.es: 1.0 para un solo turno, 1.1 para dos turnos, 1.2 para tres turnos (considera diferenciales de turno).
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1.0 للوردية الواحدة، 1.1 للورديتين، 1.2 لثلاث ورديات (يراعي فروق الورديات).

rules.message: Efficiency below 50% indicates severe operational issues; consider Lean assessment.
Yield below 80% suggests significant quality problems; Six Sigma project recommended.
Overhead exceeds 50% of direct labor cost; review overhead structure.

thresholds.message: Shop hourly rate exceeds $150/hr; benchmark against industry.
Efficiency critically low; immediate process improvement needed.

hiddenLossDrivers: Composite model — validate each cost leg against actuals
Physical exposure factors are normalized estimates
suggestedActions: Reconcile labor and maintenance legs separately
Benchmark noise/vibration factors with site measurement
